response.justification: Strong 20-year software engineering background with recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP tooling), but lacks the deep AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI products that define this specialist role. Experience is spread across many domains rather than specialized—candidate shows Staff-level IC chops but no evidence of director-level strategic leadership or recognized AI/ML authority required for the position.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software engineering across web, mobile, infrastructure, and cloud
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and frameworks—recent platform-level AI exposure
Cloud infrastructure competency (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, microservices at scale)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or products; MCP work is infrastructure tooling, not AI strategy
Limited director-level leadership experience—roles are Senior/Staff IC without evidence of strategic decision-making at scale
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field and no recognized AI expertise; AI work began only April 2025

key_factors.factor: Sufficient engineering years and cloud background
